title: Mission to Destrillion
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Mission |prev=[[Battle of Geonosis (Galactic Civil War)|Third Battle of Geonosis]]''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle of Dubrillion (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Dubrillion]] |image=[[File:Wedge_at_destrillion.jpg]] |name=Mission to Destrillion |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |objective=Destroy [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Tibanna gas platform]] |date=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]This mission during ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' takes place in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] becomes [[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader]] after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places in in 3 ABY. |place=[[Destrillion]] |result=Indecisive outcome |side1=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |side2=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] *[[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=*1 [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]] *4 [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] *[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] |ppl2=*24 [[TIE/hu "Hunter" Multi-Role Starfighter|TIE Hunters]] *Several [[Imperial Action transport|Imperial Action transports]] |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=None |casual2=All TIE Hunters |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|I have a bad feeling about this!|Wedge Antilles before he starts the mission|}} During this '''mission''' to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Destrillion]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] was assigned to pinpoint critical targets in an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna]] Gas facility for a squad of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] to [[Proton bomb/Legends|bomb]]. Antilles flew through the tunnels leading to the facility and engaged a new [[TIE/hu "Hunter" Multi-Role Starfighter|Imperial starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]. He subsequently took out the [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] and discovered that there was in fact no facility. ==Prelude== [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] received information about an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] gas installation conducting scientific weapons research in the [[Destrillion]] system.''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] was given a task force, including the ace [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to destroy the installation. ==The battle== {{Quote|They've activated some sort of force field. I'm trapped!''"
"''Wedge, we can't reach you. You're on your own.|Wedge Antilles and Crix Madine|}} [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] flew an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] and was in command of a squad of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] toward the facility. General Crix Madine contacted him and informed him of his mission objectives. Antilles noticed the energy fields protecting the facility included a series of corridors and volunteered to fly through them. In the tunnel, Antilles encountered about two squadrons of [[TIE/hu "Hunter" Multi-Role Starfighter|TIE Hunters]] flying around a [[Tibanna gas platform]]. Antilles later relayed the presence of the squadron to Madine, and stated that he hadn't encountered them before, with Madine then deducing that they were most likely the Empire's new Hunter line of TIE fighters: The Hunters were a new [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] designed to match the capabilities of the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Madine contacted Antilles and warned him of the dangers the new TIEs posed. [[Force field/Legends|Force fields]] activated, blocking the corridors. Antilles subsequently engaged the Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] and was able to destroy them with the help of his A-wing's [[Missile/Legends|missiles]]. With the TIEs gone, the force fields deactivated. Antilles then contacted Madine, who ordered the pilot to continue into the second tunnel to locate the facility. Continuing to the end of the tunnels, Antilles discovered that there was no facility; there was just was a [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] of [[Imperial Action transport|transports]] about to jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Antilles contacted Madine with this fact, and Madine ordered him to return to the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. In truth, the battle was a diversion in order to [[Battle of Dubrillion (Galactic Civil War)|lure]] a Rebel convoy near [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] and destroy it using Dubrillion's [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]]. [[File:Concept_RS3.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Rebel Strike concept art of a floating, airborne installation.]] ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|Infiltrate the Empire's secret research facility. Locate vital targets, and transmit their coordinates to the Y-wing groups.|Mission briefing for "Deception at Destrillion"|}} This event was a mission appearing in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''. In the Developer's Commentary, it was revealed there was to be an extended mission, but was cut out for time. It would have involved an infiltration of the facility via a walker, and calling Y-wings targeting sensitive areas. The player was originally tasked with destroying a floating installation. The [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] is the default craft for the mission but it is possible to fly another craft in later run-throughs. The mission, "Deception at Destrillion," contained a tech upgrade. However, it was not within the Destrillion level itself. It was, however, in the Dubrillion half of the mission. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 3 ABY 2}} {{Interlang |es=Misión a Destrillion }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Destrillion, mission to}} [[Category:Battles of Destrillion]] [[Category:Missions of the Galactic Civil War]]
